---
title: "G6PD_MAVE_analysis"
author: "Renee Geck"
date: "2025-09-25"
---

```{r readme_citation}
#This data is from a study available at https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.08.11.669723v2
#Please cite: Geck RC, et al. 2025. Functional evidence for G6PD variant classification from mutational scanning. bioRxiv. doi: https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.08.11.669723
```

```{r setup_tools}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggpubr)
library(scales)
library(plotly)

rsq <- function(x, y) summary(lm(y~x))$r.squared
pop_sd <- function(x) {sqrt((length(x)-1)/length(x)) * sd(x)} #population standard deviation instead of sample
```

```{r import_data}
countess_scores <- read.csv("activity_MAVE_scores.csv", header=T) #scored by CountESS
countess_scores_pivot <- read.csv("activity_MAVE_pivoted_scores.csv", header=T) #scored by CountESS
vamp_scores <- read.csv("abundance_MAVE.csv", header=T)
pumptime <- read.delim(file="pumptime.txt", header=T)
yeast_freq_var <- read.delim(file="activity_MAVE_variant_frequencies.txt", header=T) #this file will need to be unzipped before reading

variant_counts_controls <- read.delim(file="activity_MAVE_variant_counts_controls.txt", header=T) #this file will need to be unzipped before reading
variant_counts_selection <- read.delim(file="activity_MAVE_variant_counts_selection.txt", header=T) #this file will need to be unzipped before reading
variant_counts <- rbind(variant_counts_controls, variant_counts_selection)

catalog <- read.delim("g6pd_catalog_sept25.txt") #based on data from github.com/reneegeck/g6pdcat, updated Sept 25, 2025

revel_predictions <- read.table("REVEL_G6PD_vars.txt", sep="\t", header=T) #I added the REVEL interpretations according to PMID: 36413997, and then made the "REVEL class" by taking any benign evidence to LB and any path evidence to LP
am_predictions <- read.table("AlphaMissense_G6PD_vars.txt", sep="\t", header=T)
predictions <- merge(am_predictions, revel_predictions, by="protein", all=T)
dms_predictions <- merge(g6pd_scores_residues_nm, predictions, by="protein")

conservation <- read.table("G6PD_domains_conservation.txt", sep="\t", header=T)
```

```{r normalize_yeast_scores}
countess_scores_piv_single <- countess_scores_pivot %>% filter(!grepl(".*;.*", protein))

countess_scores_piv_single <- countess_scores_piv_single %>%
  mutate(rep1_score_norm = (countess_scores_piv_single$score__rep_1__cond_control - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_1__cond_control, na.rm = TRUE)) / (median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "S")$score__rep_1__cond_control, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_1__cond_control, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    mutate(rep2_score_norm = (countess_scores_piv_single$score__rep_2__cond_control - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_2__cond_control, na.rm = TRUE)) / (median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "S")$score__rep_2__cond_control, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_2__cond_control, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    mutate(rep3_score_norm = (countess_scores_piv_single$score__rep_3__cond_stress - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_3__cond_stress, na.rm = TRUE)) / (median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "S")$score__rep_3__cond_stress, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_3__cond_stress, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    mutate(rep4_score_norm = (countess_scores_piv_single$score__rep_4__cond_stress - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_4__cond_stress, na.rm = TRUE)) / (median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "S")$score__rep_4__cond_stress, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_piv_single, type == "N")$score__rep_4__cond_stress, na.rm = TRUE)))

countess_scores_norm <- data.frame(countess_scores_piv_single$protein, countess_scores_piv_single$type, countess_scores_piv_single$rep1_score_norm, countess_scores_piv_single$rep2_score_norm, countess_scores_piv_single$rep3_score_norm, countess_scores_piv_single$rep4_score_norm)

colnames(countess_scores_norm) <- c("protein", "type", "rep1_score_norm", "rep2_score_norm", "rep3_score_norm", "rep4_score_norm")

#also make a long pivot version
countess_scores_norm_long <- countess_scores_norm %>% pivot_longer(cols = !c(protein, type), names_to ="repl", values_to = "score_norm")
countess_scores_norm_long$repl <- substring(countess_scores_norm_long$repl, 1, 4)
```

```{r normalize_abundance_scores}
#note that the replicates in the vamp-seq file are called 1 and 3; in the paper they are called 1 and 2 (which is 3 in this file)

#normalize
vamp_scores <- vamp_scores %>%
  mutate(rep1_score_norm = (vamp_scores$score__rep_1 - median(subset(vamp_scores, type == "N")$score__rep_1, na.rm = TRUE)) / (median(subset(vamp_scores, type == "S")$score__rep_1, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(vamp_scores, type == "N")$score__rep_1, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    mutate(rep3_score_norm = (vamp_scores$score__rep_3 - median(subset(vamp_scores, type == "N")$score__rep_3, na.rm = TRUE)) / (median(subset(vamp_scores, type == "S")$score__rep_3, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(vamp_scores, type == "N")$score__rep_3, na.rm = TRUE)))

vamp_scores_norm <- data.frame(vamp_scores$aaChangeHGVS, vamp_scores$type, vamp_scores$rep1_score_norm, vamp_scores$rep3_score_norm)

colnames(vamp_scores_norm) <- c("protein", "type", "rep1_score_norm", "rep3_score_norm")

#remove the deletions because not using
vamp_scores_norm <- subset(vamp_scores_norm, type != "D")

#also make a long pivot version
vamp_scores_norm_long <- vamp_scores_norm %>% pivot_longer(cols = !c(protein, type), names_to ="repl", values_to = "score_norm")
vamp_scores_norm_long$repl <- substring(vamp_scores_norm_long$repl, 1, 4)
```

```{r yeast_nonpiv_data}
#------ below is with non-pivoted, might not need to keep this

#remove anything with multiple variants because have p.[*;*]
countess_scores_single <- countess_scores %>% filter(!grepl(".*;.*", protein))

#normalize scores to S=1, N=0 for rep 1
countess_scores_r1 <- subset(countess_scores_single, rep ==1)
countess_scores_r1 <- countess_scores_r1 %>%
  mutate(score_norm = (countess_scores_r1$score - median(subset(countess_scores_r1, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)) /
  (median(subset(countess_scores_r1, type == "S")$score, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_r1, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)))

#normalize scores to S=1, N=0 for rep 2
countess_scores_r2 <- subset(countess_scores_single, rep ==2)
countess_scores_r2 <- countess_scores_r2 %>%
  mutate(score_norm = (countess_scores_r2$score - median(subset(countess_scores_r2, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)) /
  (median(subset(countess_scores_r2, type == "S")$score, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_r2, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)))

#normalize scores to S=1, N=0 for rep 3
countess_scores_r3 <- subset(countess_scores_single, rep ==3)
countess_scores_r3 <- countess_scores_r3 %>%
  mutate(score_norm = (countess_scores_r3$score - median(subset(countess_scores_r3, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)) /
  (median(subset(countess_scores_r3, type == "S")$score, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_r3, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)))

#normalize scores to S=1, N=0 for rep 4
countess_scores_r4 <- subset(countess_scores_single, rep ==4)
countess_scores_r4 <- countess_scores_r4 %>%
  mutate(score_norm = (countess_scores_r4$score - median(subset(countess_scores_r4, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)) /
  (median(subset(countess_scores_r4, type == "S")$score, na.rm = TRUE) - median(subset(countess_scores_r4, type == "N")$score, na.rm = TRUE)))
```

```{r S1D_plot_yeast_synon_nons}
#make a histogram of synonymous and nonsynonymous variants by replicate
#rep 1 and 2 are controls, rep 3-4 are selection

activity_rep_histo <- ggplot(data=subset(countess_scores_norm_long, type != "W")) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(x= score_norm, fill=type), position="stack", binwidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cacaca", "#1338BE", "#B90E0A")) +
  facet_wrap(~repl) +
  theme_linedraw()
ggsave(file = "250124_activity_rep_histo.pdf", activity_rep_histo, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 6)

```

```{r S2B_plot_vamp_synon_nons}
#make a histogram of synonymous and nonsynonymous variants by replicate
#what is replicated 2 in this data has errors and is not used further. Rep3 == rep2 in the paper.

abundance_rep_histo <- ggplot(data=subset(vamp_scores_norm_long, type != "W")) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(x= score_norm, fill=type), position="stack", binwidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cacaca", "#1338BE", "#B90E0A")) +
  facet_wrap(~repl, nrow=1) +
  theme_linedraw()
ggsave(file = "250124_abundance_rep_histo.pdf", abundance_rep_histo, device="pdf", height = 2.2, width = 6)
```

```{r S1A_culture_doublings}
culture_doublings <- ggplot(data=pumptime,
       aes(x=time, y=volume_replacements, color=condition)) + 
  geom_point(aes(shape=as.factor(replicate))) +
  geom_smooth() +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("black", "#1338BE")) +
  xlab("time (hours)") +
  ylab("culture doublings") +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250626_culture_doublings.pdf", culture_doublings, device="pdf", height = 2.5, width = 3.7)
```

```{r S1B_plot_known_variants}
variant_counts <- variant_counts %>%
  mutate(bc_freq = count/total)

fave_vars <- subset(variant_counts, protein %in% c("p.=", "p.Asn126Asp", "p.Ser188Phe"))
fave_vars$protein <- factor(fave_vars$protein, levels=c("p.=", "p.Asn126Asp", "p.Ser188Phe"))

fave_vars_sumfreq <- fave_vars %>%
  group_by(protein, rep, cond, time) %>%
  summarize_at(vars(bc_freq), list(total_freq=sum))

fave_vars_graph <- ggplot(data=subset(fave_vars_sumfreq, cond=="stress"),
       aes(x=time, y=total_freq)) + 
  geom_smooth(color="#1338BE") +
  geom_point(aes(shape=as.factor(rep)), color="black") +
  #scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10",n.breaks = 15, labels = function(x) ifelse(x == 0, "0", x)) + #make log2 yaxis
  facet_wrap(.~protein, scales="free_y", nrow=1) +
  xlab("time (hours)") +
  ylab("frequency") +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250626_fave_vars_graph.pdf", fave_vars_graph, device="pdf", height = 2.5, width = 8)
```

```{r S1C_plot_yeast_repl}
#make a scatterplot of replicates in the same condition

#controls are kind of a cloud but it's expected since no selection, Rsq=0.494
activity_ctl_corr <- ggplot(data = countess_scores_norm, aes(x=rep1_score_norm, y=rep2_score_norm)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.1) +
  geom_smooth(method='lm', formula= y~x) +
  xlab("replicate 1") +
  ylab("replicate 2") +
  theme_linedraw()
ggsave(file = "250124_activity_ctl_corr.pdf", activity_ctl_corr, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 4)
print(rsq(countess_scores_norm$rep1_score_norm, countess_scores_norm$rep2_score_norm)) #0.4939433

#stress look like good correlation, Rsq=0.952
activity_sel_corr <- ggplot(data = countess_scores_norm, aes(x=rep3_score_norm, y=rep4_score_norm)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.1) +
  geom_smooth(method='lm', formula= y~x) +
  xlab("replicate 1") +
  ylab("replicate 2") +
  theme_linedraw()
ggsave(file = "250124_activity_sel_corr.pdf", activity_sel_corr, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 4)
print(rsq(countess_scores_norm$rep3_score_norm, countess_scores_norm$rep4_score_norm)) #0.9516919
```

```{r S2A_plot_vamp_repl}
#removed rep 2 because of histogram above

#1 vs 3 correlation, Rsq=0.717
abundance_corr <- ggplot(data = vamp_scores_norm, aes(x=rep1_score_norm, y=rep3_score_norm)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.1) +
  geom_smooth(method='lm', formula= y~x) +
  xlab("replicate 1") +
  ylab("replicate 2") +
  theme_linedraw()
ggsave(file = "250124_abundance_corr.pdf", abundance_corr, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 4)
print(rsq(vamp_scores_norm$rep1_score_norm, vamp_scores_norm$rep3_score_norm)) #0.7191613
```

```{r S1E_activity_variant_change_over_time}
ggplot(data=subset(yeast_freq_var, condition=="stress" & mut_count==1),
       aes(x=time_hr, y=total_freq)) + 
  geom_line(aes(color=diff_aa), stat="smooth", method="lm", alpha=0.008, se=F, show.legend=F) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10",n.breaks = 15, labels = function(x) ifelse(x == 0, "0", x)) + #make log2 yaxis
  scale_color_manual(values=rep(c("black"), 11000)) +
  #geom_line(color="blue", stat="smooth", method="lm",se=F, show.legend=F, size=2) +
  xlab("time(hours)") +
  ylab("variant frequency") +
  facet_wrap(.~mut_type, nrow=1) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

```{r normalize_data}
#average the yeast activity data
#if one is NA it will just report the one that is not NA
yeast_countess_scores <- countess_scores_norm %>% 
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(ctl_score = (pmax(rep1_score_norm, rep2_score_norm, na.rm=TRUE) + pmin(rep1_score_norm, rep2_score_norm, na.rm=TRUE))/2,
         stress_score = (pmax(rep3_score_norm, rep4_score_norm, na.rm=TRUE) + pmin(rep3_score_norm, rep4_score_norm, na.rm=TRUE))/2,
         ctl_stdev = sd(c(rep1_score_norm, rep2_score_norm)),
         stress_stdev = sd(c(rep3_score_norm, rep4_score_norm)))

yeast_stress_scores <- select(yeast_countess_scores, protein, type, stress_score, stress_stdev)

#average the VAMP-seq abundance data
vamp_scores_norm <- vamp_scores_norm %>% 
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(abund_score = (rep1_score_norm + rep3_score_norm)/2,
         abund_stdev = sd(c(rep1_score_norm, rep3_score_norm)))

vamp_scores_avg <- select(vamp_scores_norm, protein, type, abund_score, abund_stdev)

#combine the two by variant; there are none that are only in the yeast library
g6pd_scores <- merge(vamp_scores_avg, yeast_stress_scores, by="protein", all.x=T, all.y=T)
g6pd_scores <- subset(g6pd_scores, select = -c(type.y))
names(g6pd_scores)[names(g6pd_scores) == 'type.x'] <- 'type'
g6pd_scores <- subset(g6pd_scores, type != "D") #remove the few deletion mutants

#calculate z scores of -1 and -3 from the synonymous distribution
activ_synon_z1 <- mean(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="S")$stress_score) - pop_sd(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="S")$stress_score)
activ_synon_z3 <- mean(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="S")$stress_score) - 3*pop_sd(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="S")$stress_score)
activ_synon_z3_pop <- mean(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="S")$stress_score) - 3*pop_sd(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="S")$stress_score)
abund_synon_z1 <- mean(subset(vamp_scores_avg, type=="S")$abund_score) - pop_sd(subset(vamp_scores_avg, type=="S")$abund_score)
abund_synon_z3 <- mean(subset(vamp_scores_avg, type=="S")$abund_score) - 3*pop_sd(subset(vamp_scores_avg, type=="S")$abund_score)

#For ones that have only abundance score, but it's low (<z=-3 from synonymous), then use the abundance score
#For ones with normal or uninformative abundance score, that we don't have activity data for, functional score = NA
#create a functional score that is the lower of the two assay scores
g6pd_scores_low <- g6pd_scores %>%
  subset(abund_score < abund_synon_z3) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(functional_score = pmin(stress_score, abund_score, na.rm=TRUE))
g6pd_scores_high <- g6pd_scores %>%
  subset(abund_score >= abund_synon_z3) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(functional_score = pmin(stress_score, abund_score, na.rm=F))
g6pd_scores <- rbind(g6pd_scores_low, g6pd_scores_high)

nonsynon_median_prenormalization <- median(subset(g6pd_scores, type == "N")$functional_score, na.rm = TRUE)
synon_median_prenormalization <- median(subset(g6pd_scores, type == "S")$functional_score, na.rm = TRUE)

#re-normalize the functional scores to S=1 and N=0
g6pd_scores <- g6pd_scores %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(functional_score_norm = (functional_score - nonsynon_median_prenormalization) /
  (synon_median_prenormalization - nonsynon_median_prenormalization))
g6pd_scores$functional_score <- NULL
g6pd_scores <- g6pd_scores %>% rename(functional_score = functional_score_norm)

write.table(g6pd_scores,"250925_G6PD_functional_scores.txt",sep="\t",row.names=FALSE)

synon_scores <- subset(g6pd_scores, type=="S")
synon_noNAfxn <- subset(synon_scores, !is.na(functional_score))

func_synon_z1 <- mean(synon_noNAfxn$functional_score) - pop_sd(synon_noNAfxn$functional_score)
func_synon_z3 <- mean(synon_noNAfxn$functional_score) - 3*pop_sd(synon_noNAfxn$functional_score)

#also with the control scores
yeast_ctl_scores <- select(yeast_countess_scores, protein, ctl_score, ctl_stdev)
yeast_ctl_scores <- merge(g6pd_scores, yeast_ctl_scores, by="protein", all=T)
write.table(yeast_ctl_scores,"250925_G6PD_all_scores.txt",sep="\t",row.names=FALSE)

#create a long version
g6pd_scores_long <- g6pd_scores %>% pivot_longer(cols = !c(protein, type), names_to ="assay", values_to = "score_norm")

#split apart the variants into start end and position
g6pd_scores_residues <- g6pd_scores %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(position = as.numeric(gsub("\\D", "", protein)), #extract the residue position
         start = str_extract(protein, "(?<=[\\.])([a-zA-Z]+)(?=[0-9])"), #extract the letters after the . and before numbers
         end = str_extract(protein, "(?<=[0-9])([a-zA-Z]+)")) #extract the letters after the numbers

g6pd_scores_residues_s <- subset(g6pd_scores_residues, type == "S") %>% rowwise %>% mutate(end = start) #have to deal with the synonymous
g6pd_scores_residues_nm <- subset(g6pd_scores_residues, type != "S")
g6pd_scores_residues <- rbind(g6pd_scores_residues_nm, g6pd_scores_residues_s)
```

```{r calculations}
#number of missense variants with average activity below zscore -3 from synonymous
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="M" & stress_score<activ_synon_z3))) #4948
#number of missense variants with average activity over zscore -1 from synonymous
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="M" & stress_score>activ_synon_z1))) #1919
#number of missense variants with average activity intermediate
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="M" & stress_score<=activ_synon_z1 & stress_score>=activ_synon_z3))) #1361

#sanity check, this is 8228 which is the sum of the three categories!
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="M"))) #8288 missense with activity scores
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="N"))) #481 nonsense with activity scores
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="S"))) #435 synonymous with activity scores

#number of missense variants with average abundance below zscore -3 from synonymous
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="M" & stress_score<abund_synon_z3))) #4338
#number of missense variants with average abundance over zscore -1 from synonymous
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="M" & stress_score>abund_synon_z1))) #2382
#number of missense variants with average abundance intermediate
print(nrow(subset(yeast_stress_scores, type=="M" & stress_score<=abund_synon_z1 & stress_score>=abund_synon_z3))) #1508

#number with abundance scores
print(nrow(subset(vamp_scores_norm, type=="M"))) #9677 missense with activity scores
print(nrow(subset(vamp_scores_norm, type=="N"))) #508 nonsense with activity scores
print(nrow(subset(vamp_scores_norm, type=="S"))) #489 synonymous with activity scores
```

```{r average_per_residue}
#take average missense score at each site
avg_res <- subset(g6pd_scores_residues, type=="M") %>% group_by(position) %>% 
  mutate(site_mean = mean(functional_score, na.rm=T),
         act_mean = mean(stress_score, na.rm=T),
         abund_mean = mean(abund_score, na.rm=T))

#just keep the residue and the means, then keep 1 per residue
avg_res <- subset(avg_res, select=c(position, site_mean, act_mean, abund_mean))
avg_res <- distinct(avg_res)
avg_res_fxn <- subset(avg_res, select=c(position, site_mean))

write.table(avg_res_fxn,"250925_ScoreByResidue.txt", sep="\t",row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r 2A_plot_activity_abundance}
act_abund_scatter <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data=subset(g6pd_scores, type=="M"), aes(x=stress_score, y=abund_score, color=type), alpha=0.08)+
  geom_point(data=subset(g6pd_scores, type=="N"), aes(x=stress_score, y=abund_score, color=type), alpha=0.08)+
  geom_point(data=subset(g6pd_scores, type %in% c("W", "S")), aes(x=stress_score, y=abund_score, color=type), alpha=0.08)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=abund_synon_z1, color="darkgray", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=abund_synon_z3, color="darkgray", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=activ_synon_z1, color="darkgray", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=activ_synon_z3, color="darkgray", linetype="dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#cacaca", "#1338BE", "#B90E0A", "#B90E0A")) +
  xlab("activity score") +
  ylab("abundance score") +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250925_actabundscatter.pdf", act_abund_scatter, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 5)

#calculate number in different groups (act-abund)
print(nrow(g6pd_scores)) #total 10675
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, stress_score>activ_synon_z1 & abund_score>abund_synon_z1))) #HH 1843, 17.3%
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, stress_score>activ_synon_z1 & abund_score<abund_synon_z3))) #LAb 55, 0.005%
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, stress_score<activ_synon_z3 & abund_score>abund_synon_z1))) #LAc 1960, 18.4%
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, stress_score<activ_synon_z3 & abund_score<abund_synon_z3))) #LL 2516, 23.6%
```

```{r 1C-D_domains_and_conservation}
conservation$conserved <- factor(conservation$conserved, levels=c("not in Zwf1", "different", "similar", "identical"))
conservation$domain <- factor(conservation$domain, levels=c("NADP-binding domain", "C-terminal domain", "NADP-binding site", "G6P-binding site", "dimerization", "structural NADP-binding site","NA"))

conservation_str <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = conservation, aes(x = position, y=1, fill=conserved)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("white", "#C2B1CD", "#85639A", "#372869")) +
  theme_classic()
ggsave(file = "250401_conservation.pdf", conservation_str, device="pdf", height = 1, width = 25)

domains_str <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = conservation, aes(x = position, y=1, fill=domain)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray70", "gray90", "black", "black","black","black","white")) +
  theme_classic()
ggsave(file = "250401_domains.pdf", domains_str, device="pdf", height = 1, width = 25)
```

```{r 2B-C_act_abund_by_site}
#cutoffs > z=-1 or <z=-3 from synonymous distribution
#LL both low, NN both normal, LAc is low activity, LAb is low abundance
avg_res <- avg_res %>% mutate(score_group="intermed")
avg_res_LL <- filter(avg_res, act_mean<activ_synon_z3 & abund_mean<abund_synon_z3) %>% mutate(score_group="LL")
avg_res_LAc <- subset(avg_res, act_mean<activ_synon_z3 & abund_mean>abund_synon_z1) %>% mutate(score_group="LAc")
avg_res_LAb <- subset(avg_res, act_mean>activ_synon_z1 & abund_mean<abund_synon_z3) %>% mutate(score_group="LAb")
avg_res_NN <- subset(avg_res, act_mean>activ_synon_z1 & abund_mean>abund_synon_z1) %>% mutate(score_group="NN")
avg_res_NA <- subset(avg_res, is.na(act_mean)) %>% mutate(score_group=NA)
avg_res_groups <- rbind(avg_res_LL, avg_res_LAc, avg_res_LAb, avg_res_NN, avg_res_NA)
avg_res_intermed <- subset(avg_res, ! position %in% avg_res_groups$position)
avg_res <- rbind(avg_res_groups, avg_res_intermed)
avg_res$score_group <- factor(avg_res$score_group, levels=c("NN", "LAb", "LAc", "LL", "intermed"))

#table of values used for visualization with Genomics2Proteins for 2C, https://g2p.broadinstitute.org/
write.table(avg_res,"250925_G6PD_residue_categories.txt",sep="\t",row.names=FALSE) 

res_act_abund <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = subset(avg_res, !is.na(score_group)), aes(x = position, y=1, fill=score_group)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#e04890", "#f6ab78", "#372869", "grey70")) +
  theme_classic()
ggsave(file = "250925_res_act_abund.pdf", res_act_abund, device="pdf", height = 1, width = 25)
```

```{r 1E-F_3_activity_heatmap}
#heatmap code adapted from Gabrielle Ferra
g6pd_scores_residues$end <- factor(g6pd_scores_residues$end, levels=c("His", "Lys", "Arg", "Asp", "Glu", "Cys", "Met", "Asn", "Gln", "Ser", "Thr", "Ala", "Ile", "Leu", "Val", "Phe", "Trp", "Tyr", "Gly", "Pro", "Ter", "NA"))

#Fig 1E
activity_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = subset(g6pd_scores_residues, is.na(start)==F), aes(x = position, y = end), fill = "grey70") + 
  geom_tile(data = subset(g6pd_scores_residues, is.na(stress_score)==F & is.na(start)==F), aes(x = position, y = end, fill = stress_score)) +
  #geom_tile(data = subset(CYP2D6_subset, score <= CYP2D6_lower_bound_act), aes(x = position, y = end), fill = “blue”) +
  #geom_tile(data = wtseqframe, aes(x = position, y= end, fill = score)) +
  #geom_point(data = wtseqframe, aes(x = position, y = end), shape = 15, size = 0.6) +
  xlab(NULL) + scale_x_continuous(limits=c(1,514), expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(1,seq(50,514,50))) +
  #scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(missing_combinations_act$end))) +
  ylab("residue") + xlab("position")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors=c("#1338BE", "white", "#B90E0A"), values=rescale(c(-0.2, 1, 1.6)), guide= "colorbar", limits=c(-0.2, 1.6)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey70"), legend.position = "right", legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust=0.5, color="black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, color="black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, color="black"),axis.title.y = element_text(size= 10, color="black"))
ggsave(file = "241203_activityheatmap.pdf", activity_map, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 25)

#Fig 1F
abundance_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = subset(g6pd_scores_residues, is.na(start)==F), aes(x = position, y = end), fill = "grey70") + 
  geom_tile(data = subset(g6pd_scores_residues, is.na(abund_score)==F & is.na(start)==F), aes(x = position, y = end, fill = abund_score)) +
  #geom_tile(data = subset(CYP2D6_subset, score <= CYP2D6_lower_bound_act), aes(x = position, y = end), fill = “blue”) +
  #geom_tile(data = wtseqframe, aes(x = position, y= end, fill = score)) +
  #geom_point(data = wtseqframe, aes(x = position, y = end), shape = 15, size = 0.6) +
  xlab(NULL) + scale_x_continuous(limits=c(1,514), expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(1,seq(50,514,50))) +
  #scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(missing_combinations_act$end))) +
  ylab("residue") + xlab("position")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors=c("#1338BE", "white", "#B90E0A"), values=rescale(c(-0.2, 1, 1.6)), guide= "colorbar", limits=c(-0.2, 1.6)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey70"), legend.position = "right", legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust=0.5, color="black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, color="black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, color="black"),axis.title.y = element_text(size= 10, color="black"))
ggsave(file = "241203_abundanceheatmap.pdf", abundance_map, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 25)

#Fig 3
function_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = subset(g6pd_scores_residues, is.na(start)==F), aes(x = position, y = end), fill = "grey70") + 
  geom_tile(data = subset(g6pd_scores_residues, is.na(functional_score)==F & is.na(start)==F), aes(x = position, y = end, fill = functional_score)) +
  #geom_tile(data = subset(CYP2D6_subset, score <= CYP2D6_lower_bound_act), aes(x = position, y = end), fill = “blue”) +
  #geom_tile(data = wtseqframe, aes(x = position, y= end, fill = score)) +
  #geom_point(data = wtseqframe, aes(x = position, y = end), shape = 15, size = 0.6) +
  xlab(NULL) + scale_x_continuous(limits=c(1,514), expand = c(0,0), breaks = c(1,seq(50,514,50))) +
  #scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(missing_combinations_act$end))) +
  ylab("residue") + xlab("position")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors=c("#1338BE", "white", "#B90E0A"), values=rescale(c(-0.2, 1, 1.6)), guide= "colorbar", limits=c(-0.2, 1.6)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey70"), legend.position = "right", legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust=0.5, color="black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, color="black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, color="black"),axis.title.y = element_text(size= 10, color="black"))
ggsave(file = "250925_functionheatmap.pdf", function_map, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 25)
```

```{r compare_to_catalog}
names(catalog)[names(catalog) == 'amino_acid'] <- 'protein'

dms_catalog <- merge(g6pd_scores_residues, catalog, by="protein")
dms_catalog$consensus_class <- factor(dms_catalog$consensus_class, levels=c("B/LB", "P/LP", "VUS"))
dms_catalog$ClinVar_class <- factor(dms_catalog$ClinVar_class, levels=c("benign", "likely_benign", "likely_pathogenic", "pathogenic", "uncertain", "conflicting", "NA"))

dms_catalog_all <- merge(g6pd_scores_residues, catalog, by="protein", all=T)
dms_catalog_all$consensus_class <- factor(dms_catalog_all$consensus_class, levels=c("B/LB", "P/LP", "VUS"))
dms_catalog_all$ClinVar_class <- factor(dms_catalog_all$ClinVar_class, levels=c("benign", "likely_benign", "likely_pathogenic", "pathogenic", "uncertain", "conflicting", "NA"))

write.table(dms_catalog,"250925_G6PD_scores_catalog.txt",sep="\t",row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r 4B_graph_data_vs_WHO2022}
dms_catalog$WHO_class_2022 <- factor(dms_catalog$WHO_class_2022, levels=c("C", "B", "A", "U"))

DMSbyWHO2022 <- ggplot(data=subset(dms_catalog, WHO_class_2022 != "U"), aes(y=functional_score, x=WHO_class_2022)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, color="gray") +
  geom_jitter(color="gray", width=0.2, alpha=0.5, size=2, stroke=NA) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA, fill=NA) +
  ylab("functional score") +
  xlab("WHO class") +
  ylim(-0.2, 1.5) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250925_DMSbyWHO2022.pdf", DMSbyWHO2022, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 2.9)

print(TukeyHSD(aov(functional_score ~ WHO_class_2022, data = subset(dms_catalog, WHO_class_2022 != "U"))))

#calculate n
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, WHO_class_2022 == "C" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #3
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, WHO_class_2022 == "B" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #30
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, WHO_class_2022 == "A" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #10
```

```{r 4C_graph_data_vs_clinvar}
DMSvsinterp <- ggplot(data=subset(dms_catalog, consensus_class %in% c("B/LB", "P/LP")), aes(y=functional_score, x=consensus_class)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, color="gray") +
  geom_jitter(color="gray", width=0.2, alpha=0.5, size=2, stroke=NA) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA, fill=NA) +
  ylab("functional score") +
  xlab("clinical interpretation") +
  ylim(-0.2, 1.5) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250925_DMSvsinterp.pdf", DMSvsinterp, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 2)

print(t.test(functional_score ~ consensus_class, data = subset(dms_catalog, consensus_class %in% c("B/LB", "P/LP"))))
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, consensus_class == "B/LB" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #147
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, consensus_class == "P/LP" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #183
```

```{r 4A_graph_data_vs_ptype}
dms_catalog$phenotype <- factor(dms_catalog$phenotype, levels=c("nondeficient", "deficient", "deficient_AHA", "deficient_CNSHA", "unknown"))

DMSbyPtype <- ggplot(data=subset(dms_catalog, phenotype != "unknown"), aes(y=functional_score, x=phenotype)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, color="gray") +
  geom_jitter(color="gray", width=0.2, alpha=0.5, size=2, stroke=NA) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA, fill=NA) +
  ylab("functional score") +
  xlab("phenotype") +
  ylim(-0.2, 1.5) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250925_phenotype.pdf", DMSbyPtype, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 3.5)

print(TukeyHSD(aov(functional_score ~ phenotype, data = subset(dms_catalog, phenotype != "unknown"))))
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, phenotype == "nondeficient" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #4
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, phenotype == "deficient" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #78
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, phenotype == "deficient_AHA" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #36
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, phenotype == "deficient_CNSHA" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #68
```

```{r 4D_functional_score_histo}
fxn_histogram <- ggplot(data=subset(g6pd_scores_long, assay == "functional_score")) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(x= score_norm, fill=type), position="stack", binwidth = 0.03) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cacaca", "#1338BE", "#B90E0A", "#B90E0A")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = func_synon_z1, linetype="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = func_synon_z3, linetype="dashed") +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250925_fxn_histogram.pdf", fxn_histogram, device="pdf", height = 3, width = 4.8)

#total number  with functional scores
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, !is.na(functional_score)))) #9527
#total number missense with functional scores
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, type=="M" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #8592
#number of missense variants with functional score over z=-1 from synonymous
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, type=="M" & functional_score>func_synon_z1))) #2245
#number of missense variants with functional score under z=-3 
print(nrow(subset(g6pd_scores, type=="M" & functional_score<func_synon_z3 ))) #4870
```

```{r 4E_functional_score_interp}
#calculate zscores of synonymous distribution for benchmarking
interp_histograms <- ggplot(data=subset(dms_catalog, ClinVar_class %in% c("benign", "likely_benign", "likely_pathogenic", "pathogenic"))) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(x=functional_score, fill=ClinVar_class), position="stack", binwidth = 0.03) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#940B08", "#E39F9D", "#A1AFE5", "#0F2D98")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=func_synon_z1, linetype="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=func_synon_z3, linetype="dashed") +
  labs(x="functional score", y="variants", fill="ClinVar\nClassification") +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave(file = "250925_interp_histogram.pdf", interp_histograms, device="pdf", height = 3, width = 5.5)

print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score<func_synon_z3))) #226 missense with patho evidence have been found in people
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score<func_synon_z3 & !(consensus_class %in% c("B/LB", "P/LP"))))) #105 VUS with patho evidence have been found in people
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score<func_synon_z3 & consensus_class == "B/LB"))) #0 B/LB get patho evidence 
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score<func_synon_z3 & consensus_class == "P/LP"))) #121 P/LP get patho evidence

print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score>func_synon_z1))) #192 with benign evidence have been found in people
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score>func_synon_z1 & !(consensus_class %in% c("B/LB", "P/LP"))))) #167 VUS with benign evidence
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score>func_synon_z1 & consensus_class == "B/LB"))) #3 B/LB get benign evidence 
print(nrow(subset(dms_catalog, type.x=="M" & functional_score>func_synon_z1 & consensus_class == "P/LP"))) #22 P/LP get benign evidence 

```

```{r oddspath}
benign_evidence <- subset(dms_catalog_all, functional_score > func_synon_z1)
patho_evidence <- subset(dms_catalog_all, functional_score < func_synon_z3)

n_pathogenic_controls <- nrow(subset(dms_catalog_all, consensus_class == "P/LP" & !is.na(functional_score)))
n_benign_controls <- nrow(subset(dms_catalog_all, consensus_class == "B/LB" & !is.na(functional_score)))

#how many clinvar path/benign vars get normal or abnormal functional scores
n_path_abnormal  <- nrow(subset(dms_catalog_all, consensus_class == "P/LP" & functional_score < func_synon_z3))
n_path_normal  <- nrow(subset(dms_catalog_all, consensus_class == "P/LP" & functional_score > func_synon_z1))
n_benign_abnormal  <- nrow(subset(dms_catalog_all, consensus_class == "B/LB" & functional_score < func_synon_z3))
n_benign_normal  <- nrow(subset(dms_catalog_all, consensus_class == "B/LB" & functional_score > func_synon_z1))

# Prior probability (P1): Proportion of pathogenic variants in the total control set
p1 <- n_pathogenic_controls / (n_pathogenic_controls + n_benign_controls)

# Posterior probability (P2) for an "abnormal" result: Proportion of pathogenic variants among controls with abnormal results
p2_abnormal <- n_path_abnormal / (n_path_abnormal + n_benign_abnormal)
# OddsPath for functionally abnormal results
oddspath_abnormal <- (p2_abnormal * (1 - p1)) / ((1 - p2_abnormal) * p1) #51.0082

# Posterior probability (P2) for a "normal" result: Proportion of pathogenic variants among controls with normal results
p2_normal <- n_path_normal / (n_path_normal + n_benign_normal)
# OddsPath for functionally normal results
oddspath_normal <- (p2_normal * (1 - p1)) / ((1 - p2_normal) * p1) #0.1579
```

```{r S3A_DMS_vs_REVELevidence}
#the REVEL cutoffs for evidence codes are from PMID: 36413997
dms_predictions$REVEL_evidence <- factor(dms_predictions$REVEL_evidence, levels=c("BP4_M", "BP4", "intermediate", "PP3", "PP3_M", "PP3_S"))

DMSvsREVELcode <- ggplot(data=subset(dms_predictions, !is.na(REVEL_evidence)), aes(y=functional_score, x=REVEL_evidence)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, color="gray") +
  geom_jitter(color="gray", width=0.2, alpha=0.2, size=2, stroke=NA) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA, fill=NA) +
  ylim(-0.2, 1.5) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  ylab("functional score") +
  xlab("REVEL score calibration (Pejaver et al.)")
ggsave(file = "250925_DMSvsREVEL.pdf", DMSvsREVELcode, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 5)

print(TukeyHSD(aov(functional_score ~ REVEL_evidence, data = subset(dms_predictions, !is.na(REVEL_evidence)))))
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, REVEL_evidence == "BP4_M" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #2
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, REVEL_evidence == "BP4" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #59
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, REVEL_evidence == "intermediate" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #933
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, REVEL_evidence == "PP3" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #444
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, REVEL_evidence == "PP3_M" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #1135
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, REVEL_evidence == "PP3_S" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #493
```

```{r S3B_DMS_vs_AMclass}
dms_predictions$AM_class <- factor(dms_predictions$AM_class, levels=c("likely_benign", "ambiguous", "likely_pathogenic"))

DMSvsAMclass <- ggplot(data=subset(dms_predictions, !is.na(AM_class)), aes(y=functional_score, x=AM_class)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, color="gray") +
  geom_jitter(color="gray", width=0.2, alpha=0.05, size=2, stroke=NA) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA, fill=NA) +
  ylim(-0.2, 1.5) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  ylab("functional score") +
  xlab("Alpha Missense class")
ggsave(file = "250925_DMSvsAMclass.pdf", DMSvsAMclass, device="pdf", height = 4, width = 2.5)

print(TukeyHSD(aov(functional_score ~ AM_class, data = dms_predictions)))
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, AM_class == "likely_benign" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #2258
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, AM_class == "ambiguous" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #965
print(nrow(subset(dms_predictions, AM_class == "likely_pathogenic" & !is.na(functional_score)))) #5697
```
